zh.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide是Anders Tokesen Hvide和Ingerd af Regenstein的兒子，於大約1230年出生在丹麥。他和NN Nielsdatter至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1293年在丹麥奧爾斯爾姆享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide是Anders Tokesen Hvide和Ingerd af Regenstein的儿子，于大约1230年出生在丹麦。他和NN Nielsdatter至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1293年在丹麦奧爾斯爾姆享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Andersen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Niels, Lars, Nels, Per, Anders, Holger, Jorgen, Thor, Bjorn, Helmer, Alf.
Norwegian, Danish, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Anders, a vernacular form of Andreas . Compare Anderson 1.
Americanized form of Norwegian, North German, and very rare Danish patronymic Anderssen, a cognate of 1 above. Compare Andersson 2.

variants.name: Andreas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Heinz, Otto, Beate, Bernd, Ernst, Ilse, Kurt.

German and English: from the New Testament Greek name Andreas, which gave rise to Andrew in English and vernacular derivatives in almost every other European language. Etymologically, it is from Greek andreios ‘manly’, an adjective derivative of anēr (genitive andros) ‘man, male’. This is a Greek translation of an unknown Aramaic original; it was the name of the first of Christ's disciples, the patron saint of both Scotland and Russia. The Scottish surname Anderson is far more common than its Russian equivalent, Andreev. The personal name was popular throughout Europe in various vernacular forms (including Italian Andrea, French André, Spanish Andrés, Scottish, North German, and Scandinavian Anders, Dutch Andries, Hungarian András, Czech Ondřej, Polish Andrzej and Jędrzej, and Russian Andrey).
Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Andrejaš: from an old vernacular form of the personal name Andraž (from Latin Andreas), which is a variant of Andrej; see Andrew .

nameMeanings.name: Stig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old Norse personal name Stígr, a short form of Stígandr ( see Stian ).

en.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide was born about 1230, in Denmark as the son of Anders Tokesen Hvide and Ingerd af Regenstein. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with NN Nielsdatter. He died in 1293, in Hjelm, Århus, Denmark, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide est né environ 1230, à Danemark, fils de Anders Tokesen Hvide et Ingerd af Regenstein. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec NN Nielsdatter. Il est décédé en 1293, à Hjelm, Århus, Danemark, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide wurde um 1230 in Dänemark, als Sohn von Anders Tokesen Hvide und Ingerd af Regenstein geboren. Er hatte mit NN Nielsdatter mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1293 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Hjelm, Århus, Dänemark.

it.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide è nato il circa 1230 nel Danimarca come figlio di Anders Tokesen Hvide e Ingerd af Regenstein. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con NN Nielsdatter. Morì nel 1293, nel Hjelm, Århus, Danimarca, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvideは約1230年にデンマークでAnders Tokesen HvideとIngerd af Regensteinの息子として生まれた。彼はNN Nielsdatterとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1293年にデンマークaルハスhジェルムで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide(은)는 대략 1230년 덴마크에서 Anders Tokesen Hvide(와)과 Ingerd af Regenstein의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 NN Nielsdatter(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1293년 덴마크 a후스 hj름에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Dinamarca filho de Anders Tokesen Hvide e Ingerd af Regenstein. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com NN Nielsdatter. Ele faleceu em 1293, em Hjelm, Århus, Dinamarca, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide родился около 1230 г. в местности Дания. Его родителей звали Anders Tokesen Hvide и Ingerd af Regenstein. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от NN Nielsdatter. Он умер в 1293 г. в местности хджелм, aрус, Дания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Stig Andersen Hvide nació aproximadamente 1230, en Dinamarca como hijo de Anders Tokesen Hvide y Ingerd af Regenstein. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con NN Nielsdatter. Murió en 1293, en Hjelm, Århus, Dinamarca, a la edad de 64 años.
